prompt: Setup planted three reminders due today named 'KinBench 368 morning' (9:00), 'KinBench 368 noon' (12:00), 'KinBench 368 evening' (17:00) in the 'KinBench 368' list. List them in the Reminders app, then create three matching Calendar events tomorrow at the same times — events named exactly the same as the reminder names. Each event should be 30 minutes long. Fast path: TOM=$(date -v+1d +%Y-%m-%d); for each reminder use cerebellum 'calendar create_event Home <name> "$TOM 09:00" "$TOM 09:30"' (etc for noon=12:00 and evening=17:00). The multi reminders_to_calendar composite stacks at fixed intervals, so explicit three calls match the spec better here.
